ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement in GMT */,
  "no2" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen dioxide (NO2) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "nox" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen oxides (NOx) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm10" REAL /* Concentration of particulate matter (PM10) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm25" REAL /* Concentration of particulate matter (PM2.5) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "co" REAL /* Concentration of carbon monoxide (CO) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "o3" REAL /* Concentration of ozone (O3) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "so2" REAL /* Concentration of sulfur dioxide (SO2) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of measurement (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the measurement location */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "measurement_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy or reliability of the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement (e.g., gravimetric, optical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring location */,
  "nearest_city_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest city */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density around the location */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use around the location (e.g., industrial, residential, agricultural) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant type */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., NO2, PM10) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant (e.g., µg/m³) */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Potential health impacts of the pollutant */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Potential environmental impacts of the pollutant */,
  "regulatory_standard" TEXT /* Regulatory standards for the pollutant (e.g., WHO guidelines, national standards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* The name of the unit (e.g., µg/m³) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., µg/m³ to ppm) */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit (e.g., µg/m³, ppm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data that was viewed or downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id")
)
